creator: nivo@yuckfou.org
text:
> Please note, I am not the maintainer for mail/dovecot-sieve (though if
> the current maintainer times out, I will happily take it on).
> That being said, this is a duplicate of ports/125064 which is awaiting
> maintainer approval.
>
> Robin
>

I am currently relocating, so temporarily unable to work on this bug.
Robin, I have no objections on you taking this port, since you do other
dovecot ports as well :-)

Greets,

Nils
